import React from 'react'; const RelatedRestaurants = ({ selectedRestaurant, relatedRestaurants, onRestaurantClick, onClose }) => { if (!selectedRestaurant) return null; return (

More from {selectedRestaurant.name}

Cuisine: {selectedRestaurant.cuisine}

Showing {relatedRestaurants.length} related restaurants Click on any card to see more related options
{relatedRestaurants.map(restaurant => (
onRestaurantClick(restaurant)} >
{restaurant.discount}
{restaurant.name}
{restaurant.cuisine}
★ {restaurant.rating} ⏱ {restaurant.deliveryTime}
))}
); }; export default RelatedRestaurants;
